common.whatsappPrefill: Hi Sendero, I'd like to talk about a project.
common.notFoundText: Looks like this trail leads nowhere. Let's get you back on track.

hero.title: We build web, mobile apps and <accent>AI agents</accent> that actually ship.
hero.subtitle: Sendero is your product team: we design, build and ship custom software — from full applications to AI agents and WhatsApp automations.

logos.title: Built with the tools the best teams use

services.title: Everything you need to take an idea to product.
services.subtitle: Four capabilities, one team. Combine them to fit exactly what your project needs.

web.title: Web applications
web.description: Platforms, dashboards and SaaS built with Next.js and React. Fast, scalable and ready to grow.

mobile.title: Mobile applications
mobile.description: iOS and Android apps with React Native and Expo. One codebase, native experience.

ai.title: AI agents
ai.description: Copilots, assistants and automations that reason over your data and act for you.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp AI agents
whatsapp.description: Support, sell and assist 24/7 with an AI agent integrated into WhatsApp Business.

process.title: A clear path from idea to launch.
process.subtitle: No surprises: you always know what stage we're at and what's next.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We understand your business, users and goals. We define scope and priorities.

design.title: Design
design.description: Prototypes and UI we validate with you before writing a single line of code.

build.title: Build
build.description: Development in short cycles with weekly demos. Clean, tested code.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We deploy, measure and fine-tune. Your product in the hands of real users.

iterate.title: Iterate
iterate.description: Continuous improvement with data. We grow the product with you, long term.

values.title: A technical partner, not just a vendor.
values.subtitle: We build as if the product were ours, because its success is ours too.

shipFast.title: Ships fast
shipFast.description: Short cycles and weekly demos. You see real progress, not promises.

ownership.title: You own the code
ownership.description: No black boxes, no lock-in. We hand over everything, documented and ready.

senior.title: Senior team
senior.description: You work directly with the people building it. No middlemen, no noise.

aiNative.title: AI-native
aiNative.description: We add AI where it delivers real value, not as marketing decoration.

stack.title: Modern tools, proven decisions.
stack.subtitle: We choose technology we'd bet our own product on.

work.title: The kind of product we build.
work.subtitle: Illustrative examples of the work we do with our clients.
work.note: Illustrative examples. Want to see concrete cases? Let's talk.

logistics.name: Logistics SaaS platform
logistics.description: Real-time tracking dashboard with route optimization for a last-mile operation.
logistics.result: Less time per delivery and full fleet visibility.

marketplace.name: Mobile marketplace
marketplace.description: iOS and Android app connecting supply and demand with built-in payments.
marketplace.result: Launched on both stores from a single codebase.

support.name: AI support agent
support.description: Assistant that answers from product docs and escalates to a human when needed.
support.result: Instant answers and a lighter load for the team.

whatsappBot.name: WhatsApp sales agent
whatsappBot.description: Agent that qualifies leads, books and replies 24/7, integrated with the client's CRM.
whatsappBot.result: No wait times and more opportunities closed.

about.title: We are Sendero.
about.lead: A product team that turns ideas into software people actually use.
body: Sendero was born from a simple idea: most software projects fail not for lack of technology, but for lack of a clear path. We map that path — from concept to production — and walk it with you.
We work as an extension of your team. We design, build and ship with the same standard we'd hold for our own product, leaning on a modern stack and on AI where it delivers real value.
Whether it's a full application, an AI agent or a WhatsApp automation, our goal is the same: get you to production fast, with something you're proud of.
about.ctaTitle: Shall we walk the path together?

cta.title: Ready to take your idea to production?
cta.subtitle: Book a 30-minute call or message us on WhatsApp. No strings attached, same-day reply.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you have in mind. We reply the same day.
contact.bookSubtitle: Pick the time that works best for a 30-minute call.
contact.whatsappSubtitle: Message us directly and we'll get right back to you.

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Name
form.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you very soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.
